title: Java Programming
content: Java Programming Event Date-: 03rd April 2025 Event brief description –: A Expert Talk on “Java Programming was organized by school of School of computer science and engineering, Galgotias University, in order enhance knowledge base and skill of computer science undergraduate students. in collaboration with the research group: IOT & Computer Networks, Web and Data Analytics and Data Science and Big Data Analytics. The objective of the workshop was to facilitate the participants to improve their knowledge of Java technologies and related certifications and their benefits. The expected outcome: the participants will understand the working, Java implementation and programing of tools. Event Detailed Description Objectives: - Platform Independence – Write code once and run it anywhere using the Java Virtual Machine (JVM). - Object-Oriented Approach – Encourage modular, reusable, and organized code using classes and objects. - Security and Robustness – Provide strong memory management and built-in security features. - Multithreading Support – Enable efficient handling of multiple tasks simultaneously. - Rich API and Ecosystem – Offer extensive libraries and frameworks for rapid development. Agenda: - Introduction to Java and its features - Setting up the Java Development Environment - Understanding Java Syntax and Structure - Data Types, Variables, and Operators - Control Flow Statements (if, switch, loops) - Object-Oriented Programming Concepts - Working with Classes and Objects - Exception Handling in Java - Basics of Java Collections and Arrays - Hands-on Practice and Q&A Session Department Name –: SCAT Event Outcome: The expected outcome: the participants will understand the working, implementation of Java programing. - Gain foundational knowledge of Java language syntax. - Understand and apply object-oriented programming concepts. - Develop and run Java applications using JDK and IDEs. - Use variables, data types, and operators effectively. - Implement decision-making and looping constructs. - Create and manage classes, objects, and methods. - Apply exception handling to build robust programs. - Utilize arrays and basic collection classes. - Debug and troubleshoot Java code efficiently. - Build simple, functional, and maintainable Java projects. After completing the expert, participants should feel more confident in their ability to design, implement Java programs. Related Goal
